heading: MARTIN LUTHER KING, JR. NATIONAL HISTORICAL PARK
label: LIX–UU MARTIN LUTHER KING, JR. NATIONAL HISTORICAL PARK
notes: CodificationSubchapter was formerly classified to subchapter CXXXIX (§ 460bbbb et seq.) of this chapter prior to transfer to this subchapter., which enacted this subchapter, originally established the Martin Luther King, Junior, National Historic Site, which is listed in a table of National Historic Sites under , National Park Service and Related Programs. The amendments made by effectively redesignated the site as the Martin Luther King, Jr. National Historical Park, after which the text of was set out as this subchapter.Pub.
